pom.xml.general_idea: Update maven-compiler-plugin source and target configuration to Java 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Compilation will fail or produce bytecode incompatible with JDK 21 if source/target remain at 16.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent version to 2.7.18 to support Java 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.4.0 does not support Java 21; runtime or startup failures will occur.
Build tools relying on these properties will target the wrong JDK version.

pom.xml.general_idea: Remove explicit version from spring-boot-starter-test to inherit from parent.
pom.xml.why_exists: Explicit version 2.4.0 conflicts with parent 2.7.18, causing dependency resolution errors.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update maven-compiler-plugin source and target in profile to Java 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Compilation will fail or produce bytecode incompatible with JDK 21 if source/target remain at 1.8.
Javadoc generation will fail if source version does not match the JDK.
